# Jyothiprakash S (JP) — AI Product Manager in Sydney

> JP is an AI Product Manager and builder based in Sydney, Australia. He builds AI
> products end to end and pairs product judgment with the ability to implement the
> stack himself. Open to AI / Technical Product Manager and AI Engineer roles, with
> full Australian work rights (485 visa) and open to sponsorship.

## Who he is

- Name: Jyothiprakash S (goes by JP)
- Role: AI Product Manager (also works as an AI Engineer / builder)
- Location: Sydney, Australia
- Work rights: Full Australian work rights on a 485 post-study work visa; open to sponsorship; available now.
- Education: Master of IT (AI & Data Science), UNSW Sydney
- Background: Ex-Product Manager at Rekro; ex-software engineer at Bewakoof (products used by 50M+ users); Startmate Student Founder Fellow.
- Certifications: Reforge — Product Foundations; Machine Learning (Andrew Ng); SSI Rescue Diver.

## What he does

- AI product management: discovery, PRDs, OKRs, experiment design, release gates.
- AI engineering: RAG pipelines, LLM evaluation harnesses, tool-using agents, multimodal.
- Interpretability research: activation probing of language models with TransformerLens (UNSW COMP6713 team project).
- From-scratch implementation: 45 NLP and LLM notebooks, a regex tokenizer to RLHF.

## Selected work

- Four hosted, mock-first AI products (evaluation, RAG, multimodal, safe agents): https://buildwithjp.ai/projects
- The Lab — 45 from-scratch NLP/LLM notebooks + interpretability research: https://buildwithjp.ai/lab
- Resume: https://buildwithjp.ai/resume
